item.title: Nothing ever dies. It merely becomes embarrassing. 摘要
item.description:
The article discusses how psychological phenomena like power posing, ego depletion, growth mindset, and stereotype threat persist in research despite being widely debunked during the replication crisis. It argues that these ideas never truly die but become 'embarrassing,' drawing an analogy from the sci-fi universe of Halo where Spartan soldiers are listed as 'missing in action' rather than dead. The author critiques the scientific ideal of falsifiability, noting that in practice, theories often evade definitive disproof through endless debates and redefinitions, leading to absurd situations where experts disagree on whether effects are 'obviously alive' or 'obviously dead.'
标签: psychology, replication crisis, scientific methodology, falsifiability, research bias, social sciences, philosophy of science, academic discourse, Halo analogy, debunked theories

item.title: Richard Moss’s 2010 Interview With John Calhoun on the Origins of Glider 摘要
item.description:
This article references a 2010 interview by Richard Moss with John Calhoun, the creator of the Glider game series, which became iconic in Mac gaming during the 1990s. It discusses the origins and development of Glider, its dedicated fan base, and how it impacted Calhoun's career. The piece includes updated links to part 2 of the interview and a related feature story, noting that original links are outdated. Moss is also highlighted as the author of 'The Secret History of Mac Gaming,' which features a chapter on Calhoun and Glider.
标签: gaming, Mac, history, interview, retro, development, software, culture, nostalgia, indie

item.title: I Will Never Respect A Website 摘要
item.description:
The article critiques the hype around AI and LLMs, arguing that they are essentially just websites or apps performing mundane tasks like summarization and automation, not revolutionary 'agents'. It highlights that AI-generated content feels hollow and untrustworthy due to hallucinations, and questions the industry's deceptive marketing and inflated claims about future capabilities like AGI. The author emphasizes that truly useful technology should be described clearly, not in hyperbolic terms.
标签: AI, LLM, critique, technology, marketing, hallucination, automation, business, ethics, software

item.title: John Calhoun on Steve Lemay 摘要
item.description:
John Calhoun recounts his experience working with designer Steve Lemay at Apple in the late 1990s, highlighting a debate over the Preview app's UI where Lemay insisted the drawer be on the right to prioritize content, which Calhoun initially opposed but respected due to Lemay's clear rationale. The article also notes Lemay's innovation of Safari's URL field doubling as a progress bar, which was initially criticized but later appreciated for its space efficiency. The piece reflects on how respectful disagreement and design evolution, such as the sidebar eventually moving left with split views, shape user experience.
标签: Apple, UI Design, Steve Lemay, John Calhoun, Preview App, Safari, Progress Bar, Design Debate, User Experience, Aqua UI

item.title: Amazon to Acquire Globalstar, Announces Agreement With Apple to Continue Service for iPhone and Apple Watch 摘要
item.description:
Amazon has agreed to acquire Globalstar, enhancing its low Earth orbit satellite network, Amazon Leo, with direct-to-device services to extend cellular coverage beyond terrestrial networks. Concurrently, Amazon and Apple announced a partnership where Amazon Leo will power satellite services for iPhone and Apple Watch, including features like Emergency SOS via satellite. This collaboration positions Amazon and Apple as allies in challenging competitors like Starlink in the satellite internet market for smartphones.
标签: Amazon, Globalstar, Apple, satellite, acquisition, direct-to-device, low Earth orbit, Emergency SOS, Starlink, smartphone

item.title: Cybersecurity Looks Like Proof of Work Now 摘要
item.description:
The UK's AI Safety Institute evaluated Claude Mythos Preview's cybersecurity capabilities, confirming its effectiveness at identifying vulnerabilities. The analysis reveals a direct correlation between token expenditure and security findings, creating an economic model where system hardening requires outspending potential attackers on token-based security reviews. This dynamic increases the value of open-source libraries, as security investments can be shared across all users, countering arguments that low-cost replacements diminish open-source appeal.
标签: cybersecurity, AI, generative-ai, LLMs, open-source, security-research, economic-model, proof-of-work, vulnerability-assessment, token-economics

item.title: Google Will Finally Begin Punishing Sites for Back-Button Hijacking in June 摘要
item.description:
Google announced on its Search Central Blog that it will expand its spam policies to explicitly prohibit 'back button hijacking,' a deceptive practice where websites interfere with browser navigation to prevent users from returning to the previous page. This violation, part of the 'malicious practices' policy, will lead to potential spam actions starting in June 2026. The move aims to prioritize user experience, as hijacking breaks expected browsing functionality and causes frustration. The article notes criticism for the delayed action, referencing a 15-year-old Reddit thread, and attributes the issue to JavaScript enabling such manipulative behaviors.
标签: Google, search, spam policies, back button hijacking, user experience, web development, JavaScript, browser navigation, SEO, malicious practices

item.title: Apple Has Hidden the Pre-Creator-Studio Versions of Keynote, Numbers, and Pages in the Mac App Store 摘要
item.description:
Apple has removed the old iWork apps (Pages, Keynote, Numbers) from the Mac App Store, leaving only the new Creator Studio versions. This resolves a confusing rollout where both versions were previously available separately. The change unifies bundle identifiers across macOS and iOS, using the iOS format (e.g., com.apple.Numbers) instead of the old macOS format (com.apple.iWork.Numbers). Existing users can still re-download the old apps from their purchase history, but new users will only see the Creator Studio versions.
标签: Apple, macOS, iOS, iWork, App Store, software update, bundle identifier, Creator Studio, Pages, Keynote

item.title: Speaking of Tips 摘要
item.description:
Kristin Tips, the presiding officer of the Texas Funeral Service Commission, has left the board. Appointed by Governor Greg Abbott in 2017 and elevated to presiding officer in May 2024, she ran San Antonio's Mission Park Funeral Chapels, Cemeteries & Crematories with her husband, Dick Tips. Governor Abbott's office acknowledged her service and stated a replacement will be announced later. Tips did not comment on her departure.
标签: Texas, Funeral Service Commission, Kristin Tips, Governor Abbott, board appointment, Mission Park, San Antonio, government, news, departure

item.title: Trusted access for the next era of cyber defense 摘要
item.description:
OpenAI has introduced GPT-5.4-Cyber, a fine-tuned variant of GPT-5.4 designed for defensive cybersecurity use cases, positioning it as a response to Anthropic's Claude Mythos. The company is also expanding its Trusted Access for Cyber program, launched in February, which allows users to verify their identity via government ID to gain reduced-friction access to OpenAI models for cybersecurity work. However, access to the best security tools still requires an additional Google Form application, similar to Anthropic's Project Glasswing process. The announcement emphasizes OpenAI's existing cybersecurity efforts and aims to democratize access, though it avoids direct mention of Anthropic.
标签: security, AI, OpenAI, generative-ai, LLM, cybersecurity, Anthropic, GPT-5.4, trusted-access, AI-security-research

item.title: On the Name of Apple’s Foldable iPhone 摘要
item.description:
According to Chinese leaker Digital Chat Station, Apple's first foldable iPhone may be named 'iPhone Ultra' rather than 'iPhone Fold', with an expected price of $2,000-$2,500. The author argues that 'iPhone Fold' is a poor name because it merely describes function, while 'Ultra' conveys luxury and feeling. Chinese manufacturers are reportedly considering following Apple's lead with 'Ultra' branding for their own foldables, albeit at lower prices. The author suggests 'iPhone Duo' as an alternative wildcard name with historical precedent.
标签: Apple, iPhone, foldable, smartphone, branding, rumor, leak, pricing, technology, hardware

item.title: Patch Tuesday, April 2026 Edition 摘要
item.description:
Microsoft released patches for 167 security vulnerabilities, including a zero-day in SharePoint Server (CVE-2026-32201) and a publicly disclosed Windows Defender flaw called BlueHammer (CVE-2026-33825). Google Chrome fixed its fourth zero-day of 2026, and Adobe Reader issued an emergency update for an actively exploited remote code execution vulnerability. Experts note this is Microsoft's second-largest Patch Tuesday ever, with speculation that AI advancements like Anthropic's Project Glasswing may be driving increased vulnerability discovery. Users are advised to restart browsers regularly to ensure updates are installed.
标签: security, vulnerabilities, Microsoft, Windows, zero-day, patch, cybersecurity, updates, AI, browser

item.title: Fraudulent Cryptocurrency App in Mac App Store Stole $9.5 Million From 50-Some Users 摘要
item.description:
A fraudulent version of the Ledger cryptocurrency wallet app appeared on the Apple App Store, leading to losses of $9.5 million from about 50 users. Victims, including a musician who lost 5.9 BTC (~$445,000), entered their seed phrases into the malicious app, resulting in immediate wallet drainage. The legitimate Ledger Live Mac app is only available via direct download from Ledger's website, with an iPhone-only version on the App Store.
标签: cryptocurrency, security, scam, Apple App Store, Ledger, wallet, fraud, financial loss, malware, consumer protection
